# Explain code

Provide a clear, detailed explanation of the selected code.

## Include
- What the code does at a high level
- Step-by-step breakdown of the logic
- Key design decisions and patterns used
- Any non-obvious behavior or edge cases
- How this code fits into the larger system (if context available)

## Context
{{{ selection }}}

Keep explanations accessible but technically accurate.
